column2: Places returns no usable reference photos for anchor/outdoors/shopping (interiors, crowds, construction, aerial video frames with artifacts); text-only generation hallucinates wrong place for obscure Zango POIs; only culture-architecture (Paroquia de Sao Lucas) uploaded

Only 2 of 4 POIs generatable: Places data for Nkayi is nearly empty; central market photo unusable (billboards/watermark/crowds) so text-only anchor used; gare ferroviaire photo-backed OK; Cathedrale Saint-Louis text-only renders invented twin-tower designs contradicting documented simple single-square-tower facade (rejected); no other verifiable walkable POIs (no parks, squares, or named shopping streets in Places)

Only 2 of 4 POIs generatable: shard lat/lng wrong (points to Beijing); anchor_hint Anqiu Confucius Temple was demolished in 1960 per county gazetteer; Places data for Anqiu city core is nearly empty (queries for People's Square, Qingyun Lake, parks, malls, pedestrian streets return no photos or photos of other cities); text-only generation for shopping-dining street (Moxi Guxiang / Xinyuan) repeatedly invents monumental drum towers / stone gates contradicting the real low-rise street, rejected; Qingyun Mountain Folk Village (outdoors) and Anqiu Museum (culture-architecture) uploaded photo-backed

0 of 4 POIs generatable: real POIs verified via web (Didao Railway Station 1943, People's Square on Zhongxin St, Guanghua Road market, Muling/Didao rivers, Didao Mine History Museum) but Places has zero photo coverage for the district (all queries return empty or other cities: Harbin 731 museum, Chengdu parks, Taiwan coal museum); text-only generation systematically invents grandiose landmarks (mega modern rail terminals, giant monuments, ornate pagodas, colonial market halls) implausible for this small coal district - 14 renders across 4 POIs all rejected as invented places

Only 2 of 4 POIs generatable: Places coverage for Guankou town (Jimei, Xiamen) is limited to Fengshan Ancestral Temple (used as photo-backed anchor) and one Fengjinghu Park photo rejected for construction cranes/backlit haze (outdoors delivered text-only generic promenade). Shopping-dining (Guankou Street) and culture-architecture (Shenqing Post Station/bridge, verified real via provincial heritage listings) have zero photo coverage and text-only generation systematically invents grand heritage canal towns, arched bridges, and ornate wooden towers (5 renders rejected). No other walkable POI has usable photos.

Only 1 of 4 POIs generatable: Places photo coverage for Huadian (Jilin) is a single stitched winter panorama of Huifa River with watermark artifacts (rejected at screening); all other queries (Peoples Square, museum, Sumi ancient city, railway station, Jinchen square, Huadian Ave commercial street, parks) return no photos or Shanghai results; text-only generation systematically invents landmarks (European domed blocks, imperial pavilion complexes, chateau spires, golden monuments, bronze statue groups - 6 renders rejected); only a generic Huifa River waterfront promenade render passed QA and was uploaded as outdoors

Only 2 of 4 POIs generatable: Wannian Bridge (anchor) and Denggao Park (outdoors) uploaded photo-backed. Juxing Pagoda (verified real: 1614 seven-story octagonal plain-brick leaning pagoda on Wugang hill) has zero Places photo coverage and 3 text-only renders invented ornate wooden-eave pagodas, rejected. Xujiang Pedestrian Street's only Places photo is a night shot (rejected at screening); photo-backed render kept readable signage and 3 text-only renders invented heritage canal towns/paifang gates, rejected. Xu River promenade text-only renders (3) invented grand pavilions/gate towers, rejected. No other walkable POI has photo coverage (Magu Shan, Congu Shan, Taiping Bridge, parks, malls all return empty).

Only 3 of 4 POIs generatable: Zhanghui Park (anchor), Sipailou Old Street (shopping-dining, crowd-cropped ref), Xishuipo Site (culture-architecture) uploaded photo-backed. Outdoors has no usable Places photos (Hui Park photo is a dusk ditch shot with person; forest park is in Hualong District, not walkable; Jindi River/lake queries empty) and 3 text-only renders for Jindi River each invented monumental pagodas/towers, rejected.
